notableEvents.label: Nolan Arenado reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Brewers challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Nolan Arenado reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Luis Rengifo. Nolan Arenado out at 2nd, shortstop Joey Ortiz to third baseman Luis Rengifo.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
